title: tpm2-tools bug fix
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[5.2-6]
- Backport upstream fixes.
  Resolves: RHEL-72772

[5.2-5]
- Backport upstream bugfix for tpm2_eventlog
  Resolves: RHEL-83453

[5.2-4]
- Backport upstream fixes.
- tpm2_checkquote: Fix check of magic number. (CVE-2024-29038)
- tpm2_checkquote: Add comparison of pcr selection. (CVE-2024-29039)
- Fix check of magic number.
  Resolves: RHEL-23198
  Resolves: RHEL-41031
  Resolves: RHEL-41035

[5.2-3]
- Backport fixes.
- Add tpm2_encodeobject tool.
  Resolves: rhbz#2160304
  Resolves: rhbz#2047342
